name: Navigate to Onboarding
goal: Navigate to the onboarding page. Once you reach /onboarding, you are done.

name: Find Devotee Onboarding
goal: Navigate to the devotee onboarding page at /onboarding/devotee. Once you reach it, you are done.

name: Find Temple Onboarding Step 1
goal: Navigate to the first step of the temple onboarding at /onboarding/temple/step1. Once you reach it, you are done.

name: Navigate to Return Page
goal: Navigate to the /return page. Once you reach it, you are done — do not click any links on the page.

name: Explore Onboarding Options
goal: Navigate to the onboarding page and identify what account types are available, then report done.

name: Navigate to Dashboard (Auth Required)
goal: Navigate to /dashboard. If you are redirected to a sign-in page, report that auth is required and mark done.
